use_cases: Dynamic hero section background with animated grid and mesh gradients
Full-screen shader-based loading or splash screen effect
Interactive decorative background for landing pages
ASCII-style visual accent for tech-focused interfaces
ai_summary: A WebGL fragment shader component rendering an animated dark grid with mesh gradients, noise dithering, vignette, and subtle ASCII art effects. The shader includes time-based scrolling animation and mouse position tracking for potential interactivity. Designed as a standalone visual background component suitable for hero sections or full-page decorative effects in modern web applications.
